title: Regularization Techniques
summary: Techniques used to prevent overfitting, such as L1 and L2 regularization, dropout, and early stopping. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Techniques. Start after Regularization and ℓ1 Regularization. It opens into Graph Regularization Techniques and Advanced Regularization Techniques.
